tool.name: Guardrails AI
tool.description: Validation-focused guardrails framework with a large validator ecosystem and freemium model.
tool.logoNotes: Official Guardrails AI project logo from the owner-controlled GitHub repo (`docs/assets/Guardrails-ai-logo-for-white-bg.svg`), committed byte-for-byte.
tool.practitionerNote: Practical for Python-heavy application teams that want validator-style output controls in app code rather than buying a full enterprise governance platform.

deployment.detail: Open-source Python library; paid managed Guardrails Hub/server also offered.

auditLogging.detail: No built-in audit log for the OSS library; managed tier unverified.

soc2.detail: Self-hosted library; certification applies to the operator.

iso27001.detail: Self-hosted library; applies to the operator's ISMS.

iso42001.detail: Self-hosted library; applies to the operator.

euAiAct.detail: Validation library component; deployers carry obligations.

licenseRisk.detail: Apache-2.0 upstream (tracked license under data-correction review).
